message: Node started: Derive the universal De Giorgi exponent formula for a dissipative PDE with diffusion order $s$ in dimension $n$. Once the general formula is established, verify it by applying it to: 3D Navier-Stokes, 2D Navier-Stokes, 1D Burgers, Surface Quasi-Geostrophic (SQG) equations, Magnetohydrodynamics (MHD), and fractional Navier-Stokes. Express all results clearly in terms of $n$ and $s$.
